warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Fordham Road Bus Priority - Sedgwick Av to Bronx River Parkway
tool_args.raw_text: Fordham Road Bus Priority, Sedgwick Av to Bronx River Parkway. Project restart announced Feb 13th. Upgrading bus lanes to offset bus lanes and widened curbside bus lanes. Converting sub-standard curbside bus lanes into loading/parking lanes and adjacent travel lane into 24/7 offset bus lane.

payload.description: Bus priority project on Fordham Road from Sedgwick Avenue to Bronx River Parkway, converting existing sub-standard curbside bus lanes to offset bus lanes and widened curbside bus lanes, with pedestrian safety treatments, expanded public space, and new loading zones.
payload.status: final proposal presented to Community Board 5
